name: 4-Day Tour: Marrakech → Merzouga → Marrakech (full round trip)

seo.title: 4-Day Marrakech Merzouga Round Trip Tour — Kasbah Route & Sahara | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private 4-day Marrakech-Merzouga tour: the Road of 1000 Kasbahs, Dades, Todra, Erg Chebbi with an option for the Draa Valley or an extra night in Merzouga. Return via Tizi n'Tichka.

hero.tagline: The Road of 1000 Kasbahs to the Sahara

intro: This 4-day round-trip tour from Marrakech offers the most complete itinerary to the Merzouga desert. You'll travel the famous Road of 1000 Kasbahs, the Dades Gorges, the Todra Gorges and the Erg Chebbi dunes, with the option of returning via the Draa Valley or spending an extra night in Merzouga (Gnawa music in Khamlia, sandboarding, nomad village).
